notes: Case 2010-4 (Complaint of Art Sartorius, et. al. vs. Siouxlands Presbytery) appears only as a docket list entry on p. 131. It was filed in 2010 but was 'assigned to panels and are in process' as of GA38 (July 2010). No decision text or substantive judicial opinion was rendered in this volume. The case was not completed in time for inclusion in the SJC's final report which covered cases 2008-11 through 2009-11 only.
